title: SLS Toothpaste: What It Is & Why to Go SLS-Free
meta_description: What is SLS in toothpaste and is it safe? Learn what sodium lauryl sulfate does, its side effects, and the best SLS-free toothpaste alternatives to try today.
image_prompt: Product photography, a small unlabeled white squeeze tube of natural toothpaste standing upright as the hero product, accompanied by a soft-bristle toothbrush resting beside it and a small ceramic cup holding a second toothbrush, arranged on a white quartz bathroom counter with a tight crop showing only the countertop surface and no sink or plumbing visible, background is a soft blurred white tile wall, lit by warm diffused morning light from a frosted window to the left, straight-on eye-level shot, landscape crop, photorealistic, 35mm lens, shot on Canon R5, wide landscape crop filling the full frame edge to edge, no letterboxing, no borders.
